Monster Survivor.name: 怪物幸存者 Monster Survivor
Monster Survivor.description:
一次横冲直撞的怪物攻击摧毁了你的家园，使你成为曾经繁荣的聚居地中为数不多的幸存者之一。无论你失去了朋友、挚爱之人，还是仅仅失去了家，你都永远不会忘记那一天发生的一切，也永远不会原谅。你把日子都花在研究造成这场灾难的特定怪物类型上，并在此过程中得知了类似的怪物袭击。如今，你成为了一名冒险者，以保护他人不必遭受与你相同的命运，并且也许有朝一日能找到那些让你踏上这条道路的怪物。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须给予智力或感知，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于用于回忆知识该毁灭你家园之怪物的技能（例如：龙使用奥秘，不死生物使用宗教），以及与该类怪物相关的学识（技能）（例如：龙学识（技能））。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{确信}专长，并将其应用于上述两项技能中的任意一项。

A rampaging monster attack destroyed your home, leaving you one of the few survivors from a once-thriving settlement. Whether you lost friends, loved ones, or just your home, you'll never forget what happened that day, and you'll never forgive. You've spent your days studying the specific type of monster that caused this calamity, and in the process learned of similar monster attacks. Now, you've become an adventurer to protect others from sharing your fate, and perhaps to someday find the monsters that set you down this path.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You’re trained in the skill used to Recall Knowledge about the monsters that destroyed your home (for instance, Arcana for dragons or Religion for undead), and the Lore skill associated with that type of monster (for instance Dragon Lore). You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} feat with either of those two skills.

Hunted.name: 被追猎 Hunted
Hunted.description:
无论是怪物还是怪物般的人，你和其他人都被俘虏、集中起来，然后被释放——俘虏你们的人明确就是为了让自己能够追猎并智取有智慧的猎物。你的俘虏者承诺，你们之中最后活下来的那一个将被放走，并获得加入他们的选择权。数日之间，你躲藏、周旋，并比你的猎人以及其他受害者坚持得更久。也许为了活下去你背叛了同伴，也许你尽力帮助所有人逃脱。无论如何，在这场狩猎结束时，你活了下来。你可能会因为那场挣扎的具体经历而成为冒险者，但归根结底，你踏上冒险并磨练你的技能，是因为这段经历已将一种本能深深烙印在你心中：你必须变得更强，成为猎人，否则你将永远只是被追猎者。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须提升敏捷或体质，另一项为自由能力提升。

你受训于隐秘（技能），以及与你的猎手类型或你被追猎的地形相关的学识（技能）（例如，巨龙学识或森林学识）。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜行者}技能专长。

Whether it was monsters or monstrous people, you and others were captured and gathered together and released with the explicit purpose of allowing your captors to hunt down and outwit intelligent prey. Your captors promised that whichever of you was the last to survive would be let free, and given the option to join them. For days you hid, eluded, and outlasted your hunters and your fellow victims. Maybe you turned on your fellows to survive, or maybe you did your best to try to help everyone escape. Regardless, at the end of the hunt, you survived. You might have become an adventurer for reasons related to the exact events of that struggle, but ultimately, you adventure and hone your skills because the experience has ingrained in you the instinct that you must grow stronger and become the hunter, lest you forever remain the hunted.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Constitution, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Stealth skill, and the Lore skill associated with the type of creature that hunted you or the terrain where you were hunted (for instance, Dragon Lore or Forest Lore). You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat.

Poacher.name: 偷猎者 Poacher
Poacher.description:
在贵族或王室拥有的土地上狩猎是非法的，惩罚从肢解到死刑不等……前提是你被抓到。但当另一种选择是你和家人注定饿死时，那根本不算选择。你不仅成功逃脱，还证明自己格外娴熟，并开始迷恋狩猎带来的刺激与危险——尽管起初，危险并非来自你的猎物本身。无论出于什么原因——也许你曾被捕后逃脱，差点被抓而被迫逃亡，或只是想去追求更大的目标——你都离开了那种生活，转而踏上冒险之路，在那里你可以追猎更巨大、更危险的猎物。

选择两个能力加值。其中一个必须加在敏捷或感知上，另一个为自由能力加值。

你受训于生存（技能）以及动物学识（技能）。你获得 @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.445h1mBcoX7hcrlX]{怪物拾荒者} 技能专长。

It's illegal to hunt on lands owned by the nobility or royalty, with penalties ranging from dismemberment to death… if you're caught. But when the other choice is certain starvation for you and your family, that's no choice at all. Not only did you get away with it, you proved to be particularly skilled and got a taste for the thrill and danger of the hunt, even though your prey themselves weren't the cause of the danger, at first. For whatever reason, whether you were captured and escaped, nearly caught and forced to flee, or just wanted to move on to bigger things, you've left that life for a life of adventure, where you can hunt bigger and more dangerous prey.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill, and the Animal Lore skill. You gain the @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.445h1mBcoX7hcrlX]{Monster Scavenger} skill feat.
